# Physical Media Vault

> A showcase for a personal physical media collection including Blu-ray, 4K UHD, and DVD titles.

## About

Physical Media Vault is a curated catalogue of a personal film and TV physical media collection. It includes films, documentaries, concert films, and TV series across various formats and publishers.

## Pages

- [Collection](https://physicalmedia.thamara.co.uk/): Browse the full collection with filters for publisher, video quality, region, package type, and media type.
- [Alphabetical Index](https://physicalmedia.thamara.co.uk/alphabetical): All titles listed A-Z.
- [Criterion](https://physicalmedia.thamara.co.uk/criterion): Criterion Collection titles sorted by spine number.
- [Stats](https://physicalmedia.thamara.co.uk/stats): Collection statistics and breakdowns.
- [Wishlist](https://physicalmedia.thamara.co.uk/wishlist): Upcoming titles of interest.

## Data

Each title includes: title, year, director, media type (Film, Documentary, Concert Film, TV), video quality (Blu-ray, 4K UHD, DVD), publisher, region, package type, and optional cover art.
